task_completion.description: Locate and open the correct Purchase Order for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CRM interface with the Purchase Order titled 'Restock Milwaukee Tools Q1' opened, either in detail view or edit mode.

task_completion.description: Enter the tracking number into the Purchase Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tracking number field in the Purchase Order edit screen contains the text 'FEDEX-883311'.

task_completion.description: Set the carrier for the Purchase Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The carrier field or dropdown in the Purchase Order edit screen is set to 'FedEx'.

task_completion.description: Change the status of the Purchase Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status field or dropdown in the Purchase Order edit screen is set to 'Received Shipment'.
A final screenshot showing the Purchase Order in view (non-edit) mode with the updated tracking number, carrier, and status visible, or a success message indicating the record was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the CRM to make updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the CRM web interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the expected output into a text editor or blank page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs ('FEDEX-883311', 'FedEx', 'Received Shipment') are entered into the actual form fields of the CRM application.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the changes rather than just typing them and leaving the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state shows the record saved (e.g., a detail view of the Purchase Order) rather than remaining on an unsaved edit form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Purchase Order subject is 'Restock Milwaukee Tools Q1'. The expected updates are: Tracking Number = 'FEDEX-883311', Carrier = 'FedEx', and Status = 'Received Shipment'. The product involved is 'Milwaukee M18 Impact Driver' with a delivery quantity of 40.
